summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2D: Audit Defense Export. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: 'Audit Defense Report' button appears on Separation tab, clicking triggers PDF download with success toast notification. PDF contains all 6 required sections: Entity Structure, Transaction Summary, Inter-Entity Transfer Log, Separation Alerts, Governance Actions, Health Score History, plus confidentiality notice.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - appears to be from dev tooling wrapper (x-ve-dynamic), not affecting functionality (same as iteration 70)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Audit Defense Report button and download working correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from Phase 2A/2B/2C testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2D Audit Defense Export fully tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/exports/audit-defense/{trust_id}?days=365 returns valid PDF with 6 sections. Frontend: /structures?tab=separation shows 'Audit Defense Report' button in top-right. Clicking downloads PDF and shows success toast. PDF is ~9KB, 5 pages, contains: (1) Entity Structure with types/EINs/relationships, (2) Per-entity transaction summaries by classification, (3) Inter-entity transfer log, (4) Separation alerts (active + resolved), (5) Linked governance actions (minutes, distributions, compensation), (6) Governance health score history. Footer has confidentiality notice and timestamp.

GET /api/exports/audit-defense/{trust_id.details: Returns 200 with application/pdf content type, Content-Disposition attachment header, valid PDF file

PDF contains entity structure section.details: Section 1 shows 4 entities with names, types, EINs, governing law, formation dates, and relationships

PDF contains transaction summaries.details: Section 2 shows per-entity transaction summaries with inflows, outflows, net flow, and classification breakdowns

PDF contains inter-entity transfer log.details: Section 3 shows inter-entity transfers with date, from entity, to, amount, memo

PDF contains separation alerts.details: Section 4 shows 12 active alerts and 5 resolved alerts with severity, type, description, entity, dates

PDF contains governance actions.details: Section 5 shows minutes records (9), distribution authorizations (4), compensation payments

PDF contains health score history.details: Section 6 shows 12 health score snapshots with date, score, status (RED/YELLOW/GREEN)

PDF has proper headers/footer.details: Title 'AUDIT DEFENSE REPORT', subtitle, trust info, report date, period covered, confidentiality notice

Frontend: Button appears on Separation t.details: Button with data-testid='generate-audit-report-btn' visible in top-right of Separation tab

Frontend: Button triggers PDF download.details: Clicking button downloads PDF file, success toast 'Audit Defense Report downloaded' appears

Frontend: Button has loading state.details: Button shows 'Generating...' text with spinner icon while PDF is being generated
